full_text:
Xu [unknown] (Shulong) 許? (叔龍)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu [unknown] (許?), styledShulong (叔龍), was born in Runan. Well respected in Yi, possibility the unnamed son of Xu Jing. Xu [unknown] was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
